calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Oct-18-2010 Assigned To Trial Court

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Oct-18-2010 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Prove-Up Hearing.
Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Lois Jones, CSR #3689.

John P. Christian, Esq. appeared for plaintiff East West Bank, as Assignee from the FDIC as Receiver for United Commercial Bank, a California banking corporation.
Betty Lan, Special Assets Officer for East West Bank, was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant Cecil Chan, an individual.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was filed on March 29, 2010.
Doe defendants were dismissed today, October 18, 2010.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff East West Bank, as Assignee from the FDIC as Receiver for United Commercial Bank, a California banking corporation, and against defendant Cecil Chan, an individual as follows:

Principal - $1,529,017.98.
Interest - Waived.
Attorney Fees - $7,862.38.
Costs - $717.39.

Total - $1,537,597.75.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-30-2010 Off Calendar

MISCELLANEOUS ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-08-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Order to Show Cause to Plaintiff's and Defendant's Counsel for failure to comply with San Francisco Superior Court Early Settlement Program Policies and Procedures No. 4. (Administrative fee) is ordered off calendar and dissolved/Fees paid. Proceedings not reported. (212)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-29-2010 Set For Trial On Oct-18-10 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206; Settlement Conference On Sep-30-10 At 03:30 P.M. In Dept 501
